ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "simulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation purpose and objectives */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Software used for the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed) */,
  "iteration_count" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed in the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the simulation */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which this frame belongs */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the simulation sequence */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the frame was simulated */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the frame was simulated */,
  "time_step" REAL /* Time step used in the simulation for this frame */,
  "bond" REAL /* Bond values calculated in the frame */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle values calculated in the frame */,
  "dihedral" REAL /* Dihedral values calculated in the frame */,
  "vdw" REAL /* Van der Waals energy contributions */,
  "eel" REAL /* Electrostatic energy contributions */,
  "delta_g_gas" REAL /* Free energy change in gas phase */,
  "delta_g_solv" REAL /* Free energy change in solvated phase */,
  "delta_total" REAL /* Total free energy change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_frames_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_contributions" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy record */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame to which these energies correspond */,
  "vdw_energy" REAL /* Van der Waals energy value for the frame */,
  "eel_energy" REAL /* Electrostatic energy value for the frame */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy contribution for the frame */,
  "enthalpy" REAL /* Enthalpy contribution for the frame */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy computed for the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_contributions_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES simulation_frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_properties" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "molecule_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecule */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES notation for the molecule */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* InChI notation for the molecule */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the molecule */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which this parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which this result belongs */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the results */,
  "result_file" TEXT /* File path to detailed results */,
  "export_formats" TEXT /* Available export formats for the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
